title: Seasonal Recovery — The Harvest
subtitle: Five months of work catches up in October. Here's how to recover before winter sets in.
author: Nate Ratcliff, LMT
license: For Healing Hands By Nate members. Personal use only. Please don't redistribute — share the membership instead.
description: A between-sessions module on how to actually recover before winter, instead of dragging summer's fatigue into a four-month freeze.
